items.title: Rockstar Games Announces Grand Theft Auto VI
items.description: Rockstar Games announced that Grand Theft Auto VI is coming in 2025 to PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S systems.
items.author: Rockstar Games Newswire Editor
items.summary: Rockstar Games details the official announcement of Grand Theft Auto VI, confirming the state of Leonida, PS5 and Xbox Series X|S support.

items.title: Vintage Vice City Pre-Order Pack
items.description:
Welcome back to Vice city.

Featuring a timeless ’55 Vapid Stanier sedan and garage alongside Ocean Beach, decadent outfits and hairstyles for both Jason and Lucia, and an iconic weapon pattern that echoes the excess of the past.
items.author: Rockstar Games Newswire Editor
items.summary: Secure exclusive in-game items including the '55 Vapid Stanier sedan, Shore Court garage, retro curls and sequin dress, and Tommy Vercetti-inspired tropical weapon skin.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto VI Launches November 19, 2026
items.description: Rockstar Games has officially confirmed that Grand Theft Auto VI will launch worldwide on November 19, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.
items.author: Rockstar Games Newswire Editor
items.summary: Rockstar Games reveals the official worldwide launch date of November 19, 2026 for Grand Theft Auto VI.

items.title: Ultimate Edition Content Details
items.description:
Welcome to Leonida, the state where anything goes. Seize everything this massive world has to offer with the Grand Theft Auto VI: Ultimate Edition, an exclusive collection of premium vehicles, weapons, apparel, and action around every corner.

Ultimate Edition bonuses are threaded across all aspects of Jason and Lucia’s story, with new items uncovered behind each chapter.
items.author: Rockstar Games Newswire Editor
items.summary: Dive into the details of the GTA VI Ultimate Edition, highlighting exclusive salons, mod shops, outfits, and classic car commissions.
